name: purchase_stamp
description: Purchase a new Swarm postage stamp with configurable amount and depth.

name: get_stamp_status
description: Get detailed information about a specific stamp including TTL, expiration, and usability.

name: list_stamps
description: List all available postage stamps with their details.

name: extend_stamp
description: Extend an existing stamp with additional funds to increase its TTL.

name: upload_data
description: Upload data to the Swarm network using a valid postage stamp (max 4KB).

name: download_data
description: Download data from the Swarm network using a reference hash.

name: check_stamp_health
description: Diagnose stamp upload readiness with errors, warnings, and suggestions.

name: get_wallet_info
description: Get gateway node wallet address and BZZ balance (diagnostic tool).

name: get_notary_info
description: Check whether the notary signing service is available on the gateway.

name: health_check
description: Check gateway and Swarm network connectivity status.
